title: Shell, Stephen - Director General, Defence Safety Authority, Ministry of Defence - ACOBA advice
body: "Air Marshal Shell left his role at the Ministry of Defence in December 2024  Chief Executive Officer, The Soldiers Sailors Airmen and Families Association Air Marshal Shell sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with The Soldiers Sailors Airmen and Families Association. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in March 2025; and the appointment was taken up in April 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
